leadText: Stance Change (Japanese: バトルスイッチ Battle Switch) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. It is the signature Ability of Aegislash.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation VI 1.1.2 Generation VII onward 1.1.3 Pokémon Legends: Z-A 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Stance Change allows Aegislash to switch between its Shield Forme and Blade Forme. Aegislash is always in Shield Forme if it is not battling, and as such, switching out reverts it to Shield Forme. If Shield Forme Aegislash uses a damaging move, it changes to Blade Forme immediately before using the move. If Blade Forme Aegislash uses King's Shield , it changes to Shield Forme immediately before using the move. Status moves other than King's Shield will not change its form. Moves that call other moves , such as Sleep Talk , will not change its form, even if they call a damaging move or King's Shield. Gastro Acid , Worry Seed , and Simple Beam fail if the target has the Ability Stance Change. Role Play , Skill Swap , Entrainment , and Doodle fail if either Pokémon has Stance Change. Stance Change cannot be copied by Trace , Power of Alchemy , or Receiver . Stance Change cannot be replaced by Mummy or Lingering Aroma , suppressed by Core Enforcer or Neutralizing Gas , or traded by Wandering Spirit . If a Pokémon other than Aegislash obtains Stance Change with Imposter or Transform , the Pokémon will not change forms. Generation VI [ edit | edit source ] If Aegislash attempts to use a move, even if it cannot execute it due to an effect such as a status condition , confusion , or disobedience , Stance Change still activates accordingly. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] If Aegislash attempts to use a move but cannot execute it due to an effect such as a status condition or confusion , Stance Change does not activate. Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] In Pokémon Legends: Z-A , Abilities do not occur in normal gameplay. However, Aegislash will change between Shield Forme and Blade Forme under the same circumstances as previous games. Due to the game's real-time combat, Aegislash can be attacked during the form change animation. It is not considered to have changed form until the animation finishes. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Stance Change has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S MD If the Pokémon uses an attack move, its Forme changes to Blade Forme, and its Attack and Sp. Atk go up while its Defense and Sp. Def go down. The Pokémon can return its Forme to Shield Forme by using King's Shield. This Ability can neither be changed nor sealed!
